Subject: Re: prelude


Wow, that sounds fantastic. Very interesting. I may have to go work in 
Los
Angeles that week. But if not, I'd love to. I'll keep you posted. Hope 
you are
having a fantastic trip.
Warmly,
Emmy
Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Date: Sun, 3 Dec 2006 16:42:35
To:Emmy Rossum <gerielle@aol.com>
Subject: Re: prelude

no,  Vaux le Vicomte,,  , How about an intellectual adventure,?  Join 
me  for an
afternoon trip?, one day next week(11-12? ) I plan to go to Harvard to 
visit
with  the Chairman of the Mind Brain Music program , along with the 
University
President and Steven Pinker . I promise , you 'll find it's as far from
Hollywood as St Petersburg  from Austrailia

----- Original Message ----
From: Emmy Rossum <gerielle@aol.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Sunday, December 3, 2006 11:15:26 AM
Subject: Re: prelude


Ooh, where in the countryside? Loire Valley?
Never been to st. Petersburg.. One of the the few places I've never 
traveled...
That and Austrailia..
Hope you are having a lovely time... Its a sleepy New York sunday... :)
xx emmy
Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless

From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Date: Sun, 3 Dec 2006 05:08:59
To:Emmy Rossum <gerielle@aol.com>

currently in  french countryside on my way to st petersburg

Subject: Re: prelude


Dear Jeffrey,
Sound enticing, however I have to work all day. I'm in the studio from 
11. When
will you return to New York City?
Warmly,
Emmy

Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Date: Fri, 1 Dec 2006 07:05:14
To:Emmy Rossum <gerielle@aol.com>
Subject: prelude

Emmy,   j.s. bach allegedly told his students , playing the piano was 
really
easy, " just play the right note at the right time"..  WIth that in 
mind, how
does 3 0clock sound , for an early tea,, . I will be glad to have my 
driver
collect you..  I can modify both the "pitch " and the timing if more 
convenient.
, however I leave this evening.    jeffrey
